title: horsfieldia xanthina subsp. xanthina
intro: Horsfieldia xanthina subsp. xanthina, commonly known as the yellow Horsfieldia or yellow Horsfieldia tree, is a plant species belonging to the family Myristicaceae. It is native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting immune system function. In herbal preparations, the roots and bark of the Horsfieldia xanthina subsp. xanthina plant are often used to make decoctions, infusions, and powders that can be used to treat various health conditions.
